title: Login Authentication Error
description: User unable to log in; receives a 500 error after entering credentials.

title: Broken Link in Footer
description: The 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer leads to a 404 page.

title: Billing Discrepancy April
description: Customer was overcharged by $15.00 compared to their subscription tier.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: The main analytics dashboard takes over 10 seconds to render data.

title: API Key Reset Request
description: Security breach suspected; need immediate rotation of production API keys.

title: Mobile App Crash on Launch
description: iOS app crashes immediately upon opening on iPhone 15.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: User requesting native dark mode support for the web portal.

title: Missing Export Data
description: CSV export for Q1 reports is missing the 'Total Revenue' column.

title: Password Reset Email Not Sent
description: User attempted to reset password but never received the verification email.

title: Cannot Upload Profile Picture
description: File upload fails consistently with 'Invalid Format' even for .jpg files.

title: Enterprise SSO Integration Fail
description: Okta integration failing to map user roles correctly during handshake.

title: Payment Method Declined
description: Customer unable to update credit card; receiving generic 'Declined' message.

title: Duplicate Notification Spam
description: Users receiving 5-10 duplicate push notifications for every one alert.

title: Unable to Delete Workspace
description: Error message 'Dependencies exist' when trying to delete an empty workspace.

title: Incorrect Language Display
description: French localization shows Spanish text in the settings menu.

title: Service Outage - Region West
description: All users in US-West reporting inability to access the platform.

title: Invitation Link Expired
description: New user invitations expire within 1 hour instead of the documented 24 hours.

title: Webhook Payload Empty
description: Incoming webhooks are hitting the endpoint but the body is empty.

title: Broken Search Filtering
description: Filtering by 'Date Range' in the search bar yields no results.

title: Bulk Upload Timeout
description: Uploading a CSV with >500 rows results in a gateway timeout.

title: Logo Transparency Issue
description: Uploaded PNG logos are showing a black background instead of transparency.

title: Incorrect Tax Calculation
description: Tax for Canadian customers is not including PST in specific provinces.

title: Missing Permission Level
description: Need a 'Viewer-Only' role that doesn't exist in current settings.

title: Trial Extension Request
description: Customer needs 7 more days to evaluate the Pro features.

title: Markdown Not Rendering
description: The comment section is showing raw Markdown tags rather than formatted text.

title: Email Template CSS Broken
description: Notification emails look distorted in Outlook desktop client.

title: Database Connection Lag
description: High latency observed in database queries during peak hours.

title: Wrong Currency Display
description: Invoices are showing $ symbols for Euro-based accounts.

title: Account Deletion Confirmation
description: User wants to confirm their data has been purged post-cancellation.

title: Keyboard Shortcut Conflict
description: Ctrl+S in the app conflicts with browser save function.
